Services.licenceText: — a genuine licensed taxi, not a ride-hailing service wrongly claiming to be “licensed”.

items.subtitle: Marseille · Provence
items.desc: Your chauffeur stays by your side all day (~ 6 to 8h). Sightseeing, meal breaks, getaways to the Calanques — a complete, tailor-made experience.

items.subtitle: MP · LYS · NCE
items.desc: Pick-up the moment you land. Personal welcome with a name sign.

items.subtitle: Saint-Charles · TGV
items.desc: Platform welcome and luggage assistance. TGV, Intercités and Eurostar connections. Punctuality guaranteed.

items.subtitle: Hospitals · Clinics · Appointments
items.desc: Medical transfers to hospitals, clinics and appointments. Attentive chauffeur, suitable vehicle, complete discretion.

items.subtitle: Business Class
items.desc: Corporate contract, monthly billing, total confidentiality. Dedicated chauffeur on request.

items.subtitle: Weddings · Galas · Evenings
items.desc: VIP chauffeur hire for weddings, galas and evening events. Immaculate fleet, absolute punctuality. Rates on quote based on duration and vehicle.

items.subtitle: France & Europe
items.desc: Paris, Monaco, Nice, Lyon. Optimal comfort over long distances. Price on quote.
Ideal for couples and small groups. Premium comfort for your sightseeing tours and transfers.
Generous space for families and groups. Perfect for guided touring days across Provence.
Maximum capacity for large groups. Ideal for group tours or outings with friends.

Calculator.intro: Tell us about your plans — a sightseeing tour, a transfer or a chauffeur hire. We reply with a tailored quote, no obligation.

Tourism.intro: Not a simple transfer — a complete experience over ~ 6 to 8h. Your chauffeur guides you, waits during your visits, takes you to lunch and stays at your side from morning to evening.
Tourism.tarifText: Rate on quote — contact us directly on WhatsApp.
Tourism.tarifNote: Minimum rate for 4 people · beyond that, supplement per person · payment on board.

circuits.name: Marseille Essentials Tour
circuits.subtitle: 6 landmarks · ~ 2h to 2h30
circuits.desc: Discover the historic heart of Marseille. From the Palais du Pharo with its breathtaking view over the harbour, to the lively Vieux-Port, by way of Notre-Dame de la Garde and the Cathédrale de la Major.
monuments: Palais du Pharo — panoramic view over the harbour
Monument aux Morts — view of the Frioul islands & Château d'If (The Count of Monte Cristo)
circuits.whatsapp: Hello, I would like to book the Marseille Essentials Tour (6 landmarks).

circuits.name: Marseille Complete Tour
circuits.subtitle: 8 landmarks · ~ 3h to 3h30
circuits.desc: The Essentials tour enriched with two further gems: the Abbaye Saint-Victor, one of the oldest churches in France, and the majestic Palais Longchamp.
monuments: Monument aux Morts — view of the Frioul islands & Château d'If (The Count of Monte Cristo)
circuits.whatsapp: Hello, I would like to book the Marseille Complete Tour (8 landmarks).

circuits.name: Cassis Tour
circuits.subtitle: Harbour & Cliffs · ~ 4h to 5h
circuits.desc: Heading to Cassis. Discover the picturesque harbour of Cassis and the view over Cap Canaille — the highest sea cliff in Europe, rising to ~ 400 metres.
monuments: Cap Canaille — ~ 400m, the highest sea cliff in Europe
circuits.whatsapp: Hello, I would like to book the Cassis Tour (4h to 5h).

circuits.name: Cassis + Aix Tour
circuits.subtitle: Full day · ~ 6h to 7h
circuits.desc: The ideal day: Aix-en-Provence in the morning with its Provençal markets and fountains, then Cassis in the afternoon with its harbour and the dizzying view over Cap Canaille (~ 400m). Lunch break included.
circuits.whatsapp: Hello, I would like to book the Cassis + Aix Tour (full day).

circuits.name: Valensole Tour
circuits.subtitle: Lavender Fields · ~ 6h
circuits.desc: Escape to the heart of authentic Provence. The endless lavender fields of Valensole offer an unforgettable sight. ~ 4h on site to wander, photograph and breathe in Provence.
circuits.whatsapp: Hello, I would like to book the Valensole Tour (lavender fields).

Footer.tagline: Guided touring in Marseille and Provence. Airport and station transfers, bespoke tours. Available 24/7, 365 days a year.

items.q: How do I book a taxi in Marseille?
items.a: By phone, WhatsApp or the online form. Instant confirmation by SMS with the chauffeur's name and number.

items.q: What are your rates for the airport?
items.a: Fixed rate from Marseille-Provence airport: €65 to the city centre.

items.q: Are you available at night and on weekends?
items.a: Yes, 24/7 and 365 days a year. Our rates do not change with the time or day.
Yes — monthly billing, dedicated chauffeur on request, trip reporting. Contact us for a quote.

items.q: Can I book for a group?
items.a: Yes, our Van (6 passengers) and Large Van (8 passengers) are available for groups, with ample luggage space.

CGV.metaTitle: Terms & Conditions | Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille
CGV.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of the Azur Prestige premium taxi service in Marseille.
CGV.title:
Terms &
Conditions

sections.title: 1. Purpose
blocks: These Terms and Conditions (T&Cs) govern all passenger transport services provided by Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille (hereinafter “the Provider”) for any private or business customer (hereinafter “the Customer”).
Any booking implies full and unconditional acceptance of these T&Cs.

sections.title: 2. Services offered
blocks: The Provider offers the following services:

items: Airport / station transfers (Marseille-Provence, Saint-Charles station and others)
One-off or contracted business travel
Sightseeing tours in PACA (Calanques, Cassis, Aix-en-Provence, etc.)
Chauffeur hire (events, weddings, evenings)
Long-distance transfers (France and Europe)

sections.title: 3. Booking
blocks: Bookings can be made by phone, WhatsApp or via the online form. They are confirmed by an SMS or summary email stating: the date, time, pick-up location, destination and agreed rate.
A booking is firm once confirmed in writing (SMS or email) by the Provider.

sections.title: 4. Rates
blocks: Rates are set in advance and communicated to the Customer before any booking. Prices are shown in euros, all taxes included.
Pricing principles:

items: Fixed rates: no meter, no surprises at the end of the ride
No undisclosed night, weekend or public holiday surcharge
Surcharge for bulky luggage or animals on prior request
Tolls and parking included unless stated otherwise

sections.title: 5. Payment
blocks: Payment can be made:

items: In cash, at the end of the ride
By bank card (debit card, Visa, Mastercard)
By bank transfer for contracted customers (monthly billing)

blocks: A deposit may be requested for long-distance rides or long-duration chauffeur hire.

sections.title: 6. Cancellation and changes
blocks: In exceptional circumstances (force majeure, accident, medical issue), cancellation terms are assessed on a case-by-case basis.

items: Be present at the agreed time and place
Drive carefully and in compliance with traffic laws
Keep the vehicles in perfect condition and cleanliness
Ensure the confidentiality of the Customer's travels
Hold the licences, insurance and regulatory authorisations in force
Be present at the agreed place and time (15-minute tolerance, beyond which the ride may be treated as a no-show)
Provide accurate pick-up and destination addresses
Not smoke inside the vehicles
Respect the vehicle and the chauffeur
Report any specific need (child seat, wheelchair, etc.) when booking

sections.title: 9. Liability
blocks: The Provider holds professional civil liability insurance. Its liability is limited to bodily and material damage directly caused by a proven fault of the Provider.

The Provider cannot be held liable for delays caused by unpredictable traffic conditions, roadworks, accidents or any other event of force majeure. Should a significant delay be likely, the Customer will be informed as soon as possible.

sections.title: 10. Disputes and applicable law
blocks: In the event of a dispute, an amicable solution will be sought first. Failing agreement, the Customer may refer the matter to a consumer mediator in accordance with articles L.611-1 et seq. of the French Consumer Code.
These T&Cs are governed by French law. Failing an amicable resolution, the competent court will be that of Marseille.

Confidentialite.metaTitle: Privacy Policy | Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille
Confidentialite.metaDescription: Privacy policy and personal data protection — Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille.
Confidentialite.title:
Privacy
Policy

sections.title: 1. Data controller
blocks: The controller of the personal data collected via this site is: Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille — contact@azurprestige.fr

sections.title: 2. Data collected
blocks: We only collect the following data when you voluntarily provide it:

items: First and last name (contact / booking form)
Phone number
Email address
Pick-up and destination addresses
Desired date and time

blocks: We do not collect any sensitive data (banking, health, etc.) via this site. Payments are processed securely during the ride.

sections.title: 3. Purpose and legal basis
blocks: Your data is used exclusively to:

items: Respond to your quote or booking requests (performance of a contract)
Send you a ride confirmation by SMS (legitimate interest)
Improve our service (legitimate interest)

blocks: We never use your data for advertising purposes and never resell it to third parties.

sections.title: 4. Retention period
blocks: Your data is kept for as long as needed to deliver the service, then archived for 3 years for customer follow-up purposes, in accordance with French tax regulations. It is then permanently deleted.

sections.title: 5. Data sharing
blocks: Your data is never sold, rented or shared with third parties for commercial purposes. It may only be passed to our technical subcontractors (host Vercel, SMS sending service) strictly for the purpose of delivering the service, these parties being subject to the same confidentiality obligations.

sections.title: 6. Cookies
blocks: This site does not use advertising cookies or analytics tracking. Only technical cookies strictly necessary for the site to function may be placed. These cookies collect no personal data.

sections.title: 7. Your rights (GDPR)
blocks: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

items: Right of access to your data
Right of rectification
Right to erasure (“right to be forgotten”)
Right to restrict processing
Right to data portability
Right to object

blocks: To exercise these rights, contact us by email at {email} or by post at our address. We undertake to respond within one month.
If you have a complaint, you may contact the CNIL: {cnil}

sections.title: 8. Security
blocks: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against any unauthorised access, loss, destruction or alteration. The site is served exclusively over HTTPS.

sections.title: 9. Changes
blocks: We reserve the right to amend this policy at any time. The update date is shown at the top of this page. We encourage you to review it regularly.

MentionsLegales.metaTitle: Legal Notice | Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille
MentionsLegales.metaDescription: Legal notice of the Azur Prestige premium taxi service in Marseille.
MentionsLegales.title: Legal notice

sections.title: 1. Site publisher
blocks: This site is published by:

sections.title: 2. Publication director
blocks: The publication director is the manager of Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille.

rows.label: Address
rows.value: 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States

sections.title: 4. Intellectual property
blocks: All content on this site (text, images, graphics, logo, icons, etc.) is the exclusive property of Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille, except for third-party content identified as such.
Any reproduction, distribution, modification, adaptation, retransmission or publication of these elements is strictly forbidden without the express written consent of Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of liability
blocks: Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of the information published on this site, the content of which it reserves the right to correct at any time and without notice.
Azur Prestige Taxi Marseille declines all liability for any errors or omissions in the information provided on this site.

sections.title: 6. Personal data
blocks: The collection and processing of personal data are described in our {privacy}.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
blocks: This site uses only technical cookies necessary for its operation. No advertising or tracking cookie is placed without your consent.

sections.title: 8. Applicable law
blocks: This legal notice is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the competent courts will be those of Marseille.
